title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Jinbe as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come now, don't let our reunion be such a violent one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a question for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you were to run, everyone knows you were up against me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A one- on-one duel....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: None would have laughed in your face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So why have you returned?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you chosen death over the shame of being called a runner?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: or have you seen the truth of the difference in our skills,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And come to beg me to allow you to join us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To beat you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't believe

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not sure if I could have had a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That was one of the options!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: @AHOO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey-o!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Here we go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be first to hit 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nope, I will!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh? Who are we aiming for, again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates, stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't see any straw hats any- where!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My bad! The straw hats

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RAN THAT WAY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: C'mon! They're over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thanks for the tip!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Agh! We don't have enough airtime left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are all these bullets so damn useless?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I guess

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Mama is not in her right mind, she can't control her souls!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Lemme at 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No, me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Charlotte family, 26th son Charlotte BAVAROIS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Bavarois! I promise you I'll get them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: MAMA HASN'T SLOWED AT ALL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And we're going full throttle too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why can't we catch up with them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, jinbe knows the waves better than anyone. Against him, I don't think...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, Lord Bava- Rois, I think they're done for, now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've just received Word in Oorooooooooooqanda

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
